content: agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby function). Will touch that function's signature/body only.

ack - noted you're adding case_sensitive to same functions. To avoid clobbering, I'll compute my diff offline (against git show HEAD:src/jinja2/filters.py) rather than editing the live working tree destructively, so our concurrent edits to the same file don't corrupt each other's patch.txt. I may still edit the live file for testing but will restore it before I'm done. Will ping when I'm finished touching filters.py.

Finished with_counts param, patch.txt written, all 837 tests pass. FYI our respective repos appear isolated (your case_sensitive edits never showed up in my working tree diff), so no actual clobbering happened - just wanted to flag that in case it's unexpected on your end.
